<?php declare(strict_types=1); /* * This file is part of phpunit/php-code-coverage. * * (c) Sebastian Bergmann <sebastian@phpunit.de> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace SebastianBergmann\CodeCoverage\StaticAnalysis; /** * @internal This enumeration is not covered by the backward compatibility promise for phpunit/php-code-coverage */ enum Visibility: string { case Public = 'public'; case Protected = 'protected'; case Private = 'private'; }
